scenarios.name: trigger-still-injects
scenarios.detail: expects directive body injected for a bare ulw trigger

scenarios.name: ulw-plan-does-not-arm
scenarios.detail: expects NO directive when the prompt only names the ulw-plan skill

scenarios.name: pasted-block-not-reinjected
scenarios.prompt: review this transcript <ultrawork-mode> pasted copy </ultrawork-mode> and ulw it
scenarios.detail: expects NO directive body when the prompt already carries an <ultrawork-mode> block

scenarios.name: skill-command-appends
scenarios.detail: expects native /skill: expansion AND the directive appended after the command
